title: Winter Weather Advisory
transcript: Attention campus community. Due to the winter storm warning issued for our area, all evening classes after 6 PM today are cancelled. The dining halls will remain open with limited hours until 8 PM. The campus safety office advises students to avoid unnecessary travel and to use the buddy system if walking on icy pathways. Shuttle services will be suspended after 7 PM. All students living in off-campus housing are encouraged to monitor local weather updates. Normal operations are expected to resume tomorrow morning unless otherwise notified.

options: All classes for the entire day
questions.explanation: The announcement states that all evening classes after 6 PM today are cancelled.

questions.stem: What does the campus safety office advise students to do?
options: Avoid unnecessary travel and walk with others
Stay in their dorm rooms until morning
Call the safety office every hour
questions.explanation: The campus safety office advises students to avoid unnecessary travel and to use the buddy system if walking on icy pathways.

questions.stem: What will happen to shuttle services?
options: They will be suspended after 7 PM
They will only serve on-campus routes
They will be free for all students
questions.explanation: The announcement says shuttle services will be suspended after 7 PM.
